title: Liquid Chromatography-Mass Spectrometry (LC-MS) with Striatal Synaptosomes
author: Chuyu Chen
materials: Three mouse striata were pooled and rapidly homogenized in four volumes of ice-cold Buffer A supplemented with a Halt protease and phosphatase inhibitor cocktail (Thermo) using a Teflon homogenizer with 12 strokes.
200 µL of phase-transfer surfactant lysis buffer (PTS), supplemented with phosphatase inhibitor cocktail 3 (Millipore-Sigma) was added to each tissue sample.
Completely dry the samples in a vacuum centrifuge

Peptides were captured on a 2-cm Acclaim PepMap trap column and separated on a 50-cm column packed with ReproSil Saphir 1.8 μm C18 beads. The mobile phase buffer consisted of 0.1% formic acid in ultrapure water (buffer A) with an eluting buffer of 0.1% formic acid in 80% (vol/vol) acetonitrile (buffer B) run with a linear 90-min gradient of 6–30% buffer B at flow rate of 300 nL/min. The UHPLC was coupled online with a Q-Exactive HF-X mass spectrometer (Thermo Fisher Scientific).

The raw files were searched directly against the mouse database with no redundant entries, using Byonic(Protein Metrics) and Sequest search engines loaded into Proteome Discoverer 2.3 software (Thermo Fisher Scientific).
All data were quantified using the label-free quantitation node of Precursor Ions Quantifier through the Proteome Discoverer v2.3 (Thermo Fisher Scientific).
The supernatant (S1’) was pooled with S1.
determine protein concentration with BCA assay
injected samples into an Ultimate 3000 nano UHPLC system (Thermo Fisher Scientific).

steps.title: Mice were administered a dose of...
steps.instruction: Mice were administered a dose of MLi-2 (10 mg/kg, 3hours) or control vehicle via oral gavage.

steps.title: Centrifuged at 1400 g, 4°C, 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuged at 1400 g, 4°C, 10 minutes.

steps.title: Centrifuged at 700 g, 4°C, 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuged at 700 g, 4°C, 10 minutes.

steps.title: Centrifuged at 13,800 g, 4°C, 10...
steps.instruction: Centrifuged at 13,800 g, 4°C, 10 minutes, resulting in a crude synaptosomal pellet (P2) and its corresponding supernatant (S2).

steps.title: The P2 pellet was resuspended in Buffer B (2
steps.instruction: The P2 pellet was resuspended in Buffer B (2.5 ml) supplemented with the protease and phosphatase inhibitor cocktail, using a Teflon homogenizer (5 strokes).

steps.title: Collect synaptic plasma membrane fraction (SPM)...
steps.instruction: Collect synaptic plasma membrane fraction (SPM) located at the interphase between the 1 M and 1.2 M sucrose fractions using a syringe and transfer to clean ultracentrifuge tubes.

steps.title: Centrifuged at 200,000 g for 30 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuged at 200,000 g for 30 minutes.

steps.title: Incubated for 10 minutes at 95°C,...
steps.instruction: Incubated for 10 minutes at 95°C, pulse-sonicated several times, and then incubated for an additional 5 minutes at 95°C.

steps.title: Centrifuged at 16,000 × g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuged at 16,000 × g for 10 minutes, collect the supernatant

steps.title: Dilute samples with 50 mM triethylammonium bicarbonate (five-fold)
steps.instruction: Dilute samples with 50 mM triethylammonium bicarbonate (five-fold)

steps.title: The samples were then normalized to...
steps.instruction: The samples were then normalized to 300 ug protein in each

steps.title: 6 ug trypsin was added for overnight digestion at 37°C
steps.instruction: 6 ug trypsin was added for overnight digestion at 37°C.

steps.title: The supernatants were collected and acidified...
steps.instruction: The supernatants were collected and acidified with trifluoroacetic acid (TFA) to a final concentration of 1% TFA.

steps.title: collect the aqueous phase (bottom layer),...
steps.instruction: collect the aqueous phase (bottom layer), dried completely in a vacuum centrifuge

steps.title: The full phosphopeptide sample was dissolved in 10
steps.instruction: The full phosphopeptide sample was dissolved in 10.5 μl of 0.05% trifluoroacetic acid with 3% (vol/vol) acetonitrile and 10 μl of each sample

steps.title: The mass spectrometer was operated in...
steps.instruction: The mass spectrometer was operated in the data-dependent mode, in which a full-scan MS (from m/z 375 to 1,500 with the resolution of 60,000) was followed by MS/MS of the 15 most intense ions (30,000resolution; normalized collision energy - 28%; automatic gain control target (AGC) - 2E4, maximum injection time - 200 ms; 60sec exclusion].

steps.title: The data from the two search engines was combined
steps.instruction: The data from the two search engines was combined.

steps.title: MS1 precursor mass tolerance was set...
steps.instruction: MS1 precursor mass tolerance was set at 10 ppm, and MS2 tolerance was set at 20 ppm. Searchcriteria included a static carbamidomethylation of cysteines (+57.0214 Da), and variable modifications of phosphorylation of S, T and Y residues (+79.996 Da), oxidation (+15.9949 Da) on methionine residues and acetylation (+42.011 Da) at N terminus of proteins.

steps.title: Search was performed with full trypsin/P...
steps.instruction: Search was performed with full trypsin/P digestion and allowed a maximum of two missed cleavages on the peptides analyzed from the sequence database. The false-discovery rates of proteins and peptides were set at 0.01.

steps.title: All protein and peptide identifications were...
steps.instruction: All protein and peptide identifications were grouped and any redundant entries were removed. Only unique peptides and unique master proteins were reported.

steps.title: For the quantification of phosphoproteomic data,...
steps.instruction: For the quantification of phosphoproteomic data, the intensities of phosphopeptides were extracted with initial precursor mass tolerance set at 10 ppm, minimum number of isotope peaks as 2, maximum ΔRT ofisotope pattern multiplets – 0.2 min, PSM confidence FDR of 0.01, with hypothesis test of ANOVA, maximum RT shift of 5 min, pairwise ratio-based ratio calculation, and 100 as the maximum allowed fold change.

steps.title: For calculations of fold-change between the...
steps.instruction: For calculations of fold-change between the groups of proteins, total phosphoprotein abundance values were added together and the ratios of these sums were used to compare proteins within different samples.

steps.title: 3 hours after administration, striata were...
steps.instruction: 3 hours after administration, striata were dissected and tissues were flash frozen and stored at −80°C until use

steps.title: Buffer A recipe (0
steps.instruction: Buffer A recipe (0.32 M sucrose, 5 mM HEPES, pH 7.4, 1 mM MgCl 2 , 0.5 mM CaCl 2 )

steps.title: The supernatant (S1) was saved, and...
steps.instruction: The supernatant (S1) was saved, and the pellet (P1) was homogenized in Buffer A (500ul) with a Teflon homogenizer (5 strokes).

steps.title: Buffer B recipe (0
steps.instruction: Buffer B recipe (0.32 M sucrose, 6 mM Tris, pH 8.0),

steps.title: Prepare discontinuous sucrose gradient (0
steps.instruction: Prepare discontinuous sucrose gradient (0.8 M/1 M/1.2 M sucrose solution in 6 mM Tris, pH 8.0, 3 ml each)

steps.title: Centrifuged in swinging bucket rotor at...
steps.instruction: Centrifuged in swinging bucket rotor at 82,500 g, 4°C, 2 hours

steps.title: The supernatant was removed and discarded,...
steps.instruction: The supernatant was removed and discarded, while the SPM pellet was flash frozen and stored at −80°C.

steps.title: phase-transfer surfactant lysis buffer (PTS)
steps.instruction: phase-transfer surfactant lysis buffer (PTS) : 12 mM sodium deoxycholate, 12 mM sodium lauroyl sarcosinate, 10 mM TCEP, and 40 mM CAA,

steps.title: P2 was then carefully loaded onto a discontinuous sucrose
steps.instruction: P2 was then carefully loaded onto a discontinuous sucrose

steps.title: digested with 6 mg Lys-C (Wako)...
steps.instruction: digested with 6 mg Lys-C (Wako) for 3 h at 37°C

steps.title: vortexed for 2 min and then...
steps.instruction: vortexed for 2 min and then centrifuged at 16,000 × g for 2 min

steps.title: Ethyl acetate solution was added at...
steps.instruction: Ethyl acetate solution was added at 1:1 ratio to the samples.

steps.title: Dry the eluted phosphopeptides in a vacuum centrifuge
steps.instruction: Dry the eluted phosphopeptides in a vacuum centrifuge.

steps.title: phosphopeptide enrichment using PolyMAC Phosphopeptide Enrichment kit (Tymora Analytical)
steps.instruction: phosphopeptide enrichment using PolyMAC Phosphopeptide Enrichment kit (Tymora Analytical)

description: Threshold forsignificance was set to p<0.05 (unadjusted p-value) & FC (difference on the log2 intensity values) ≥ 0.58.
